untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of nested ABCD harmonic patterns with multi-timeframe analysis, leg-by-leg structural validation, and retracement ratio thresholds. These pattern recognition elements cannot be expressed using only the available indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Properties). ABCD pattern detection requires pattern-specific logic or machine learning, not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used ADX > 25 to confirm established trend (higher timeframe trend requirement) and SMA_50 crossovers to signal directional confirmation and invalidation. However, this does NOT capture the core signal: complex ABCD pullback pattern recognition with C-leg retracement validation and D-leg momentum confirmation. The timeframe_ratio, retracement_max, and abcd_confirmation_bars parameters remain untranslatable without custom pattern detection logic.
